---
title: "The RedeC2 Team"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  freeze: auto
  cache: false
  warning: false
  message: false
resources:
  - ../figures/
  - ../_input_data/C2_team_images/
  - ../_input_data/icons/
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(htmltools)
library(openxlsx)

team_data <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("../_input_data/C2_team.xlsx")
names(team_data) <- make.names(names(team_data))

clean_file_name <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(iconv(x, from = "UTF-8", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT"))
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[^a-z0-9]+", "_")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "_+", "_")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "^_|_$", "")
  paste0(x, ".jpg")
}

team_data <- team_data %>%
  mutate(
    first_letter = toupper(str_sub(Member, 1, 1)),
    photo_file = clean_file_name(Member),
    photo_path = ifelse(
      file.exists(file.path("../_input_data/C2_team_images", photo_file)),
      paste0("../_input_data/C2_team_images/", photo_file),
      "../_input_data/C2_team_images/default.jpg"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(Member)
```

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
```

```{=html}
<style>
:root {
  --rc2-red: #A93632;
  --rc2-red-dark: #6E1F1D;
  --rc2-green: #626A38;
  --rc2-green-dark: #2E3B24;
  --rc2-green-soft: #D7DDC5;
  --rc2-ochre: #D99A27;
  --rc2-cream: #F6F1E8;
  --rc2-paper: #FFFDF7;
  --rc2-ink: #171717;
  --rc2-muted: #675F55;
  --rc2-line: rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  --rc2-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);

  --rc2-safe-gutter: clamp(0.75rem, 2.6vw, 2.25rem);
  --rc2-content-max: 1260px;
  --rc2-wide-max: 1480px;
  --rc2-xl-max: 1560px;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }

html,
body {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0 !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.90), rgba(246,241,232,0.86)),
    url("../figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: cover;
  background-attachment: fixed;
  background-position: center top;
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

img, video, iframe, svg, canvas { max-width: 100%; }
a { color: var(--rc2-red); }

#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content,
main,
main.content,
.page-columns,
.page-columns .content {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  overflow-x: hidden !important;
}

main.content {
  background: transparent;
  width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 0 3.5rem 0 !important;
}

.quarto-title-block,
#title-block-header {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Navbar */
.navbar {
  box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.navbar .navbar-brand,
.navbar .nav-link {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

.navbar .nav-link.active-section {
  color: var(--rc2-red) !important;
  font-weight: 800;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--rc2-red);
}

/* =========================================================
   HERO — PADRÃO HOME / PROTOCOLS
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-page-hero {
  position: relative;
  width: 100vw;
  max-width: 100vw;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
  margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
  min-height: clamp(620px, 88vh, 880px);
  display: grid;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  isolation: isolate;
  color: #fff;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 14%, rgba(217,154,39,0.38), transparent 28%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 82%, rgba(169,54,50,0.26), transparent 36%),
    linear-gradient(108deg, rgba(23,23,23,0.84) 0%, rgba(46,59,36,0.82) 42%, rgba(110,31,29,0.72) 100%),
    url("../figures/c2_bg.jpg");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.rc2-page-hero::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.40) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 46%, rgba(0,0,0,0.56) 100%),
    repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.055) 0 1px, transparent 1px 16px);
}

.rc2-page-hero::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 5px;
  z-index: 1;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--rc2-ochre) 0%, var(--rc2-red) 50%, var(--rc2-green) 100%);
}

.rc2-page-hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  width: min(1360px, calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: clamp(4.8rem, 8vw, 7.5rem) 0 clamp(3rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(240px, 0.36fr);
  gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
  align-items: center;
}

.rc2-kicker {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.82rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.24);
  color: var(--rc2-ochre);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.9vw, 0.76rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.7s ease both;
}

.rc2-kicker::before {
  content: "";
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--rc2-ochre);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(217,154,39,0.28);
}

.rc2-page-hero h1 {
  margin: 0.7rem 0 0;
  max-width: 980px;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: clamp(4rem, 10vw, 9.6rem);
  line-height: 0.78;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.10em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-shadow: 0 10px 42px rgba(0,0,0,0.54);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.1s ease both;
}

.rc2-title-line {
  display: block;
}

.rc2-title-line:nth-child(2) {
  margin-left: clamp(1.6rem, 8vw, 6.8rem);
}

.rc2-title-rule {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 1.05rem 0 1.25rem;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.2s ease both;
}

.rc2-title-rule::before {
  content: "";
  flex: 0 0 clamp(36px, 5vw, 72px);
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--rc2-ochre);
  border-radius: 2px;
}

.rc2-title-rule::after {
  content: "";
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
}

.rc2-page-hero p {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.94);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.9vw, 1.38rem);
  line-height: 1.58;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.42);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.28s ease both;
}

/* Keywords slim */
.rc2-keywords {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin: 1.2rem 0 0;
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.36s ease both;
}

.rc2-keyword {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 36px;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.78rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(23,23,23,0.46);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.26);
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.93);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.78vw, 0.72rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.09em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
}

.rc2-keyword--red   { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-red); }
.rc2-keyword--green { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-green-soft); }
.rc2-keyword--ochre { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-ochre); }
.rc2-keyword--cream { border-left: 4px solid var(--rc2-cream); }

/* Logo card */
.rc2-hero-logo-card {
  align-self: center;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.8rem);
  border-radius: 28px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.18);
  box-shadow:
    0 22px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.20),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  animation: fadeSlideUp 0.75s 0.18s ease both;
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card img {
  width: clamp(94px, 10vw, 150px);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.36));
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.15);
}

.rc2-hero-logo-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.78);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(0.86rem, 1.15vw, 0.98rem);
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* =========================================================
   SEÇÕES
   ========================================================= */
.rc2-section,
.content-card {
  width: min(var(--rc2-content-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 2.4rem auto 0;
  padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.4rem);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(217,154,39,0.08), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.96), rgba(246,241,232,0.88));
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  border-top: 5px solid var(--rc2-green);
  box-shadow: var(--rc2-shadow);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.rc2-section--wide {
  width: min(var(--rc2-wide-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
}

.rc2-section-title {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.35rem;
}

.rc2-section-title::before {
  content: "";
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--rc2-ink);
  opacity: 0.72;
}

.rc2-section-title h2 {
  margin: 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  color: var(--rc2-red);
  font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.1rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-lead,
.lead {
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0 !important;
  padding-left: 1rem;
  border-left: 5px solid var(--rc2-ochre);
  color: #191711 !important;
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.3rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.65 !important;
}

.rc2-section p,
.content-card p {
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  line-height: 1.72;
}

.rc2-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 280px), 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}

.rc2-card {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 0;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.84);
  border: 1px solid var(--rc2-line);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.065);
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.rc2-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.30);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.rc2-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.7rem 0;
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.11em;
  line-height: 1.25;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.rc2-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--rc2-muted);
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* =========================================================
   TEAM
   ========================================================= */
.team-controls {
  width: min(var(--rc2-content-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 2.4rem auto 0;
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 24px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.92);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(260px,0.65fr) minmax(0,1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.team-search {
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28);
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.92);
  padding: 0.72rem 1rem;
  color: var(--rc2-ink);
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
}

.team-index {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.3rem;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.team-index a,
.team-index span {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 1.85rem;
  height: 1.85rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.66rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.team-index a {
  background: rgba(169,54,50,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(169,54,50,0.24);
  color: var(--rc2-red);
}

.team-index span {
  background: rgba(98,106,56,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.12);
  color: rgba(103,95,85,0.45);
}

.team-group {
  width: min(var(--rc2-wide-max), calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 1rem auto 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 320px), 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
}

.team-card {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 24px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.96), rgba(246,241,232,0.84));
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
}

.team-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.28);
}

.team-photo-wrap {
  position: relative;
  height: clamp(260px,28vw,390px);
  background: var(--rc2-green-soft);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.team-photo {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
  filter: saturate(0.96) contrast(1.03);
  transition: transform 0.8s ease;
}

.team-card:hover .team-photo {
  transform: scale(1.035);
}

.team-photo-wrap::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(23,23,23,0) 42%, rgba(23,23,23,0.62) 100%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.team-letter {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0.8rem;
  left: 0.8rem;
  z-index: 2;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 2.2rem;
  height: 2.2rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(46,59,36,0.82);
  color: var(--rc2-ochre);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-weight: 900;
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.24);
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
}

.team-info {
  padding: 1rem;
}

.team-name {
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0;
  color: var(--rc2-green-dark);
  font-size: clamp(1.05rem,1.4vw,1.35rem);
  line-height: 1.08;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
}

.team-affiliation {
  margin: 0.6rem 0 0 0 !important;
  color: var(--rc2-muted) !important;
  font-size: 0.86rem !important;
  line-height: 1.45 !important;
}

.team-icons {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  margin: 0.75rem 0 0 0;
}

.icon-link {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 2rem;
  height: 2rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.92);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.20);
  transition: transform 0.16s ease, background 0.16s ease;
}

.icon-link:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  background: #fff;
}

.icon-link img {
  width: 1rem;
  height: 1rem;
  object-fit: contain;
}

.team-empty {
  display: none;
  width: min(900px, calc(100% - var(--rc2-safe-gutter) * 2));
  margin: 1rem auto;
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: rgba(169,54,50,0.08);
  border: 1px dashed rgba(169,54,50,0.30);
  color: var(--rc2-red-dark);
}

/* =========================================================
   ANIMAÇÕES
   ========================================================= */
@keyframes fadeSlideUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.reveal-ready {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(42px);
  transition: opacity 0.72s ease, transform 0.72s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);
  transition-delay: var(--reveal-delay, 0ms);
  will-change: opacity, transform;
}

.reveal-ready.is-visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .reveal-ready {
    opacity: 1 !important;
    transform: none !important;
    transition: none !important;
  }
}

/* =========================================================
   RESPONSIVO
   ========================================================= */
@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .rc2-page-hero-inner {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .rc2-hero-logo-card {
    max-width: 420px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .team-controls {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .team-index {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  .rc2-section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .rc2-page-hero {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .rc2-page-hero h1 {
    font-size: clamp(3.3rem, 17vw, 6rem);
  }

  .rc2-title-line:nth-child(2) {
    margin-left: 0;
  }

  .rc2-section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 34px 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 420px) {
  :root { --rc2-safe-gutter: 0.65rem; }

  .rc2-section,
  .content-card {
    padding: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.35rem);
    border-radius: 22px;
  }
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-page-hero" id="team-hero" aria-label="RedeC2 team hero">
  <div class="rc2-page-hero-inner">

    <div>
      <div class="rc2-kicker">People · Institutions · Collaboration</div>

      <h1>
        <span class="rc2-title-line">RedeC2</span>
        <span class="rc2-title-line">team</span>
      </h1>

      <div class="rc2-title-rule" aria-hidden="true"></div>

      <p>
        A distributed scientific network connecting researchers, students and
        institutions working on Caatinga and Cerrado monitoring.
      </p>

      <div class="rc2-keywords" aria-label="Team keywords">
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--green">Researchers</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--red">Students</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--ochre">Institutions</span>
        <span class="rc2-keyword rc2-keyword--cream">Collaboration</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <aside class="rc2-hero-logo-card" aria-label="RedeC2 team identity">
      <img src="../figures/logoc2.png" alt="RedeC2 logo">
      <div class="rc2-hero-logo-card-divider"></div>
      <p>People, profiles and institutional links across the Rede C2 network.</p>
    </aside>

  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<section class="rc2-section" id="team-overview">
  <div class="rc2-section-title"><h2>Scientific network</h2></div>

  <div class="rc2-grid-2">
    <p class="rc2-lead">
      The RedeC2 team brings together people working on long-term vegetation
      monitoring, floristics, functional traits, restoration, biodiversity
      synthesis and dry ecosystem conservation.
    </p>

    <div class="rc2-card">
      <h3>Use the search</h3>
      <p>
        Filter by name or institution, or use the alphabet index to jump
        through the team list.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{r generate-team-cards, echo=FALSE}
get_value <- function(member, possible_names, default = "") {
  for (name in possible_names) {
    if (name %in% names(member) && !is.na(member[[name]]) && member[[name]] != "") {
      return(as.character(member[[name]]))
    }
  }
  default
}

generate_member_card <- function(member) {
  email <- get_value(member, c("Email", "email", "E.mail", "E.mail."))
  institution <- get_value(member, c("Institution", "Instittution", "Institution.", "Affiliation"), "Affiliation not specified")
  lattes <- get_value(member, c("Lattes", "Lattes.", "lattes"))
  orcid <- get_value(member, c("ORCID", "Orcid", "orcid", "ORCID."))
  scholar <- get_value(member, c("Google.Scholar", "Google.Scholar.", "GoogleScholar", "Scholar"))
  website <- get_value(member, c("Personal.Website", "Personal.Website.", "Website", "PersonalWebsite"))

  icon_html <- ""

  if (email != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(
      icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="mailto:', htmlEscape(email), '" aria-label="Email">',
      '<img src="../_input_data/icons/_email.png" alt="Email"></a>'
    )
  }

  if (lattes != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(
      icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', htmlEscape(lattes), '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Lattes">',
      '<img src="../_input_data/icons/_lattes.png" alt="Lattes"></a>'
    )
  }

  if (orcid != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(
      icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', htmlEscape(orcid), '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="ORCID">',
      '<img src="../_input_data/icons/_orcid.png" alt="ORCID"></a>'
    )
  }

  if (scholar != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(
      icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', htmlEscape(scholar), '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Google Scholar">',
      '<img src="../_input_data/icons/_scholar.png" alt="Google Scholar"></a>'
    )
  }

  if (website != "") {
    icon_html <- paste0(
      icon_html,
      '<a class="icon-link" href="', htmlEscape(website), '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Website">',
      '<img src="../_input_data/icons/website.png" alt="Website"></a>'
    )
  }

  paste0(
    '<article class="team-card" data-name="', htmlEscape(tolower(member$Member)),
    '" data-institution="', htmlEscape(tolower(institution)),
    '" id="letter-', htmlEscape(member$first_letter), '">',
      '<div class="team-photo-wrap">',
        '<span class="team-letter">', htmlEscape(member$first_letter), '</span>',
        '<img src="', htmlEscape(member$photo_path), '" alt="', htmlEscape(member$Member), '" class="team-photo" loading="lazy" decoding="async">',
      '</div>',
      '<div class="team-info">',
        '<h3 class="team-name">', htmlEscape(member$Member), '</h3>',
        '<div class="team-icons">', icon_html, '</div>',
        '<p class="team-affiliation">RedeC2 member at ', htmlEscape(institution), '</p>',
      '</div>',
    '</article>'
  )
}

letters_present <- unique(toupper(team_data$first_letter))

letter_links <- sapply(
  LETTERS,
  function(letter) {
    if (letter %in% letters_present) {
      paste0('<a href="#letter-', letter, '">', letter, '</a>')
    } else {
      paste0('<span>', letter, '</span>')
    }
  }
)

all_cards <- paste(
  vapply(seq_len(nrow(team_data)), function(i) generate_member_card(team_data[i, ]), character(1)),
  collapse = "\n"
)

HTML(
  paste0(
    '<div class="team-controls">',
      '<input type="text" id="team-search" class="team-search" placeholder="Search by name or institution..." aria-label="Search team by name or institution">',
      '<div class="team-index" aria-label="Alphabetical team index">', paste(letter_links, collapse = ""), '</div>',
    '</div>',
    '<div class="team-empty" id="team-empty">No team members match your search.</div>',
    '<section class="team-group" aria-label="RedeC2 team members">',
      all_cards,
    '</section>'
  )
)
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const searchInput = document.getElementById("team-search");
  const empty = document.getElementById("team-empty");

  if (!searchInput) return;

  searchInput.addEventListener("input", function() {
    const term = this.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    const cards = document.querySelectorAll(".team-card");
    let visible = 0;

    cards.forEach(function(card) {
      const haystack = ((card.dataset.name || "") + " " + (card.dataset.institution || "")).toLowerCase();
      const show = haystack.includes(term);
      card.style.display = show ? "" : "none";
      if (show) visible += 1;
    });

    if (empty) empty.style.display = visible ? "none" : "block";
  });
});
</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll(
    ".rc2-section, .content-card, .rc2-page-hero, .team-controls, .team-card"
  );

  revealTargets.forEach((el, index) => {
    el.classList.add("reveal-ready");
    el.style.setProperty("--reveal-delay", `${Math.min(index, 8) * 45}ms`);
  });

  if (
    window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches ||
    !("IntersectionObserver" in window)
  ) {
    revealTargets.forEach(el => el.classList.add("is-visible"));
  } else {
    const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add("is-visible");
          revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px" });

    revealTargets.forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));
  }

  const sections = document.querySelectorAll("section[id]");
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar a[href]");

  if (sections.length && "IntersectionObserver" in window) {
    const navObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

        const id = entry.target.id;

        navLinks.forEach(link => {
          const href = link.getAttribute("href") || "";
          link.classList.toggle("active-section", href.endsWith("#" + id));
        });
      });
    }, { rootMargin: "-35% 0px -55% 0px", threshold: 0 });

    sections.forEach(section => navObserver.observe(section));
  }
});
</script>
```
